title: ruta broussonetiana
intro: Ruta broussonetiana, also known as common rue or garden rue, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ruta broussonetiana include its ability to treat digestive issues, relieve pain and inflammation, and support the immune system. The herb can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural dye.
